level_92_before.speaker: Maya
level_92_before.text_en: Mercury is not mainly difficult because it is small. We look through a long wedge of warm, moving air near the horizon.
level_92_before.text_zh: 水星的主要困难不只是小，而是我们要穿过地平线附近厚而温暖、持续流动的大气。

level_92_before.speaker: Maya
level_92_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_92_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_94_before.speaker: Maya
level_94_before.text_en: Venus is brighter than the detail we want. Tonight, controlling excess light matters more than collecting more.
level_94_before.text_zh: 金星本身比我们想看的细节更亮。今晚，控制过量光线比增加集光更重要。

level_94_before.speaker: Maya
level_94_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_94_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_96_before.speaker: Maya
level_96_before.text_en: Saturn tempts us to add power. But ring structure appears only when the air and mount can support that power.
level_96_before.text_zh: 土星很容易让人一味增加倍率，但只有大气和支架支撑得住时，环结构才会出现。

level_96_before.speaker: Maya
level_96_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_96_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_98_before.speaker: Maya
level_98_before.text_en: Uranus does not reward a quick glance. The proof is a tiny disk that survives precise focus instead of collapsing into a star point.
level_98_before.text_zh: 天王星不适合匆匆一瞥。证据是精准合焦后仍保持的小圆面，而不是缩成恒星光点。

level_98_before.speaker: Maya
level_98_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_98_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_100_before.speaker: Maya
level_100_before.text_en: For Neptune, aim is part of observation. The finder gets us to the right star field; aperture and time separate the planet from the stars.
level_100_before.text_zh: 观测海王星时，瞄准本身就是观测的一部分。寻星镜带我们到正确星场，口径和时间再把行星从恒星中分离出来。

level_100_before.speaker: Maya
level_100_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_100_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_102_before.speaker: Maya
level_102_before.text_en: The Moon is no longer one target. Low power gives us geography before high power gives us detail.
level_102_before.text_zh: 月球不再只是一个目标。低倍率先给我们地理位置，高倍率再给细节。

level_102_before.speaker: Maya
level_102_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_102_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_106_before.speaker: Maya
level_106_before.text_en: A double star asks whether the telescope can separate angles, not whether it can make one bright blob larger.
level_106_before.text_zh: 双星考验的是望远镜能否分开角距离，而不是把一个亮斑放得更大。

level_106_before.speaker: Maya
level_106_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_106_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_110_before.speaker: Maya
level_110_before.text_en: A filter cannot create light, but it can reject the background wavelengths that hide a nebula. Your eyes still need time.
level_110_before.text_zh: 滤镜不能创造光，但能压低遮蔽星云的背景波段。你的眼睛仍然需要时间适应。

level_110_before.speaker: Maya
level_110_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_110_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_114_before.speaker: Maya
level_114_before.text_en: We already know individual stars. Now Big Dipper turns several stars into a map: shape first, sequence second, position last.
level_114_before.text_zh: 我们已经认识单颗恒星。现在北斗七星把多颗星变成地图：先看形状，再按顺序连线，最后核对位置。

level_114_before.speaker: Maya
level_114_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_114_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_116_before.speaker: Maya
level_116_before.text_en: We already know individual stars. Now Cassiopeia turns several stars into a map: shape first, sequence second, position last.
level_116_before.text_zh: 我们已经认识单颗恒星。现在仙后座把多颗星变成地图：先看形状，再按顺序连线，最后核对位置。

level_116_before.speaker: Maya
level_116_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_116_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_118_before.speaker: Maya
level_118_before.text_en: We already know individual stars. Now Cygnus turns several stars into a map: shape first, sequence second, position last.
level_118_before.text_zh: 我们已经认识单颗恒星。现在天鹅座把多颗星变成地图：先看形状，再按顺序连线，最后核对位置。

level_118_before.speaker: Maya
level_118_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_118_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_120_before.speaker: Maya
level_120_before.text_en: We already know individual stars. Now Lyra turns several stars into a map: shape first, sequence second, position last.
level_120_before.text_zh: 我们已经认识单颗恒星。现在天琴座把多颗星变成地图：先看形状，再按顺序连线，最后核对位置。

level_120_before.speaker: Maya
level_120_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_120_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_122_before.speaker: Maya
level_122_before.text_en: We already know individual stars. Now Aquila turns several stars into a map: shape first, sequence second, position last.
level_122_before.text_zh: 我们已经认识单颗恒星。现在天鹰座把多颗星变成地图：先看形状，再按顺序连线，最后核对位置。

level_122_before.speaker: Maya
level_122_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_122_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_124_before.speaker: Maya
level_124_before.text_en: We already know individual stars. Now Taurus turns several stars into a map: shape first, sequence second, position last.
level_124_before.text_zh: 我们已经认识单颗恒星。现在金牛座把多颗星变成地图：先看形状，再按顺序连线，最后核对位置。

level_124_before.speaker: Maya
level_124_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_124_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_126_before.speaker: Maya
level_126_before.text_en: We already know individual stars. Now Scorpius turns several stars into a map: shape first, sequence second, position last.
level_126_before.text_zh: 我们已经认识单颗恒星。现在天蝎座把多颗星变成地图：先看形状，再按顺序连线，最后核对位置。

level_126_before.speaker: Maya
level_126_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_126_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_128_before.speaker: Maya
level_128_before.text_en: We already know individual stars. Now Orion turns several stars into a map: shape first, sequence second, position last.
level_128_before.text_zh: 我们已经认识单颗恒星。现在猎户座把多颗星变成地图：先看形状，再按顺序连线，最后核对位置。

level_128_before.speaker: Maya
level_128_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_128_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_130_before.speaker: Maya
level_130_before.text_en: We already know individual stars. Now Leo turns several stars into a map: shape first, sequence second, position last.
level_130_before.text_zh: 我们已经认识单颗恒星。现在狮子座把多颗星变成地图：先看形状，再按顺序连线，最后核对位置。

level_130_before.speaker: Maya
level_130_before.text_en: This is not a name swap. Watch the image and use the control that answers this target's specific difficulty.
level_130_before.text_zh: 这不是换个名字的重复任务。观察图像，并使用真正针对该目标困难的控制。

level_93_before.speaker: Maya
level_93_before.text_en: Same Mercury, harder question: tonight the window sits higher, 12 to 28 degrees, and the twilight fades faster.
level_93_before.text_zh: 还是水星，但问题更难了：今晚的窗口更高，在 12 到 28 度之间，而且暮光消退得更快。

level_93_before.speaker: Maya
level_93_before.text_en: Keep the magnification at 80x or below, and wait for the steadier moments before you judge the disk. Patience is the instrument tonight.
level_93_before.text_zh: 把倍率控制在 80 倍以内，等大气稳定的瞬间再判断盘面。今晚真正的仪器是耐心。

level_95_before.speaker: Maya
level_95_before.text_en: You saw the crescent of Venus once. Tonight prove you understand WHY: compare a low power view against a high power view of the same phase.
level_95_before.text_zh: 你已经见过金星的弯月。今晚要证明你明白其中原理：用低倍率和高倍率分别看同一个月相并比较。

level_95_before.speaker: Maya
level_95_before.text_en: The exposure window is the same trap as before - too bright and the crescent edge burns away. Adjust it at BOTH magnifications.
level_95_before.text_zh: 曝光窗口还是同一个陷阱——太亮弯月边缘就烧没了。两个倍率下都要调好曝光。

level_97_before.speaker: Maya
level_97_before.text_en: The rings again - but tonight the mount does the holding, and you do the tuning. Set the tracking rate close to 1.0 and keep Saturn centered for eight seconds.
level_97_before.text_zh: 又是土星环——但今晚由支架来稳住，你来微调。把追踪速率调到接近 1.0，并让土星在中心停留八秒。

level_97_before.speaker: Maya
level_97_before.text_en: If the rate drifts off, Saturn slides out slowly. Watch the drift direction: it tells you whether the rate is too fast or too slow.
level_97_before.text_zh: 速率不准，土星就会慢慢滑出去。注意漂移方向——它会告诉你速率是偏快还是偏慢。

level_99_before.speaker: Maya
level_99_before.text_en: Uranus round two. The disk has not grown - your standards have. Tonight the focus tolerance is tighter and you need at least 90x.
level_99_before.text_zh: 第二次看天王星。盘面没有变大——是你的标准提高了。今晚对焦容差更严格，倍率至少 90 倍。

level_99_before.speaker: Maya
level_99_before.text_en: Remember: a star stays a point at any focus. A planet only becomes a disk at EXACT focus. That difference is the whole lesson.
level_99_before.text_zh: 记住：恒星在任何焦点下都是一个点，而行星只有在精确对焦时才会变成小圆面。这个区别就是全部课程。

level_101_before.speaker: Maya
level_101_before.text_en: Neptune, final exam of the planet series. Darker adaptation, a longer hold, and this time use averted vision - look slightly beside it.
level_101_before.text_zh: 海王星，行星系列的期末考试。更深的暗适应、更长的保持时间，而且这次要用侧视法——视线稍微偏开一点。

level_101_before.speaker: Maya
level_101_before.text_en: Your eye's center sees color, its edge sees faint light. Neptune is faint light. Trust the edge.
level_101_before.text_zh: 眼睛的中心看颜色，边缘看微光。海王星就是微光。相信你的余光。

level_103_before.speaker: Maya
level_103_before.text_en: From the flat maria we climb into the mountains: Copernicus. Terraced walls, a central peak, and shadows that carve everything in relief.
level_103_before.text_zh: 从平坦的月海爬进山地：哥白尼环形山。阶梯状的坑壁、中央峰，还有把一切刻出立体感的阴影。

level_103_before.speaker: Maya
level_103_before.text_en: You will need more magnification than the maria lesson - at least 70x - and a more careful focus. Detail lives at the edge of sharpness.
level_103_before.text_zh: 你需要比月海课更高的倍率——至少 70 倍——和更细心的对焦。细节就藏在清晰度的边缘。

level_104_before.speaker: Maya
level_104_before.text_en: The terminator is the line where lunar night meets day. Along it, shadows are longest and every crater stands tall.
level_104_before.text_zh: 终结线是月球昼夜的分界线。沿线阴影最长，每个环形山都显得格外高大。

level_104_before.speaker: Maya
level_104_before.text_en: Tonight the Moon will not wait: keep tracking engaged and hold the line in view. Watch how the shadow direction flips across the line.
level_104_before.text_zh: 今晚月亮不会等你：保持追踪并让终结线停在视野里。注意阴影方向在线两侧是相反的。

level_105_before.speaker: Maya
level_105_before.text_en: One Moon, two magnifications. Low power shows the whole terminator sweep; high power dives into a single crater's shadow.
level_105_before.text_zh: 同一个月面，两种倍率。低倍率看到整条终结线，高倍率钻进单个环形山的阴影里。

level_105_before.speaker: Maya
level_105_before.text_en: Switch between them and compare. Neither is 'better' - each answers a different question. That is how real observers work.
level_105_before.text_zh: 在两种倍率之间切换并比较。没有哪个更好——它们回答不同的问题。真正的观测者就是这样工作的。

level_107_before.speaker: Maya
level_107_before.text_en: Albireo again, but appreciation is over - tonight is discipline. Keep both colors cleanly separated for the whole observation.
level_107_before.text_zh: 又是辇道增七，但欣赏结束了——今晚讲纪律。整个观测过程中都要让两种颜色干净地分开。

level_107_before.speaker: Maya
level_107_before.text_en: Too much power and the air smears them together; too little and they merge into one dot. Find the stable middle.
level_107_before.text_zh: 倍率太高，大气会把它们抹在一起；太低，它们又并成一个点。找到稳定的中间值。

level_108_before.speaker: Maya
level_108_before.text_en: Tonight's problem is the opposite of everything so far: the Pleiades are TOO BIG. At high power the cluster simply does not fit.
level_108_before.text_zh: 今晚的问题和以前完全相反：昴星团太大了。高倍率下整个星团根本装不进视野。

level_108_before.speaker: Maya
level_108_before.text_en: Use your LOWEST magnification. Wide field, all seven sisters at once. Sometimes the best telescope move is to zoom out.
level_108_before.text_zh: 用你最低的倍率。宽视场，同时看到七姐妹。有时候望远镜最好的操作是把视野放大。

level_109_before.speaker: Maya
level_109_before.text_en: M13 is a ball of several hundred thousand stars. To your eye it is a faint smudge - until your dark adaptation deepens.
level_109_before.text_zh: M13 是几十万颗恒星组成的球。对肉眼它只是一团微光——直到你的暗适应加深。

level_109_before.speaker: Maya
level_109_before.text_en: Start at low power to find the halo, let your eyes adapt, then push the magnification to resolve the outer stars into points.
level_109_before.text_zh: 先用低倍率找到光晕，让眼睛适应黑暗，再提高倍率把外围恒星分解成一个个光点。

level_111_before.speaker: Maya
level_111_before.text_en: The Ring Nebula again - tonight is an experiment on your own eye. Look straight at it, then look slightly away. Note the difference.
level_111_before.text_zh: 又是环状星云——今晚的实验对象是你自己的眼睛。先直视它，再把视线稍微移开，记下差别。

level_111_before.speaker: Maya
level_111_before.text_en: Direct vision uses cones: sharp but blind to faint light. Averted vision uses rods: coarse but sensitive. The nebula will teach you which is which.
level_111_before.text_zh: 直视用的是视锥细胞：清晰但对微光迟钝。侧视用的是视杆细胞：粗糙却灵敏。星云会告诉你谁是谁。

level_112_before.speaker: Maya
level_112_before.text_en: The Lagoon Nebula is a wide glowing cloud. Keep the field wide, keep the filter on, and protect your dark adaptation.
level_112_before.text_zh: 礁湖星云是一大片发光的云。保持宽视场、开着滤镜，并保护好你的暗适应。

level_112_before.speaker: Maya
level_112_before.text_en: If you zoom in you will see a brighter patch and lose the lagoon shape entirely. The shape IS the object tonight.
level_112_before.text_zh: 如果放大，你只会看到一块更亮的斑，而完全丢掉礁湖的形状。今晚的目标就是那个形状。

level_113_before.speaker: Maya
level_113_before.text_en: The Sombrero galaxy - the hardest light in this whole series. A galaxy's glow crossed thirty million light years to reach your mirror.
level_113_before.text_zh: 草帽星系——整个系列里最难捕捉的光。这束星系之光跨越了三千万光年才到达你的镜面。

level_113_before.speaker: Maya
level_113_before.text_en: No filter helps a galaxy. You need everything at once: full dark adaptation, averted vision, steady tracking, and a long, patient hold.
level_113_before.text_zh: 滤镜帮不了星系。你需要同时用上所有本领：完全的暗适应、侧视法、稳定追踪，和长时间耐心保持。

level_115_before.speaker: Maya
level_115_before.text_en: You know the Dipper's shape. Tonight use it: sweep the aim to the catalog azimuth and altitude and pin the pattern at the view center.
level_115_before.text_zh: 你已经认识北斗的形状。今晚要用它：把视野转到星表方位和高度，把整个图形钉在视野中心。

level_115_before.speaker: Maya
level_115_before.text_en: Real navigators go the other way too - the two bowl stars point at Polaris. Every constellation you learn is a signpost.
level_115_before.text_zh: 真正的导航者还会反过来用——斗口两星指向北极星。你学会的每个星座都是路标。

level_117_before.speaker: Maya
level_117_before.text_en: Cassiopeia's W never sets from our latitude - it circles the pole. That makes it the winter counterpart of the Dipper.
level_117_before.text_zh: 仙后座的 W 在我们的纬度永不落下——它绕着北天极转，是北斗在冬天的接班人。

level_117_before.speaker: Maya
level_117_before.text_en: Navigate to its catalog position. When the Dipper is low, the W is high: together they always give you north.
level_117_before.text_zh: 把视野导航到它的星表位置。北斗低垂时 W 正高挂：两者合起来，北方永远找得到。

level_119_before.speaker: Maya
level_119_before.text_en: Follow the Swan down the Milky Way. Tonight you steer: put Cygnus's long neck right on the view center.
level_119_before.text_zh: 沿着银河追天鹅。今晚由你掌舵：把天鹅座长长的脖颈正好放到视野中心。

level_119_before.speaker: Maya
level_119_before.text_en: Deneb, the tail, is one corner of the Summer Triangle. Center the cross and you hold the whole summer sky's map.
level_119_before.text_zh: 尾巴上的天津四是夏季大三角的一角。把十字架居中，整个夏夜星空的地图就在你手里。

level_121_before.speaker: Maya
level_121_before.text_en: Lyra is small but exact. Vega plus a neat parallelogram - once seen, never confused with anything else.
level_121_before.text_zh: 天琴座小而精确。织女星加一个整齐的平行四边形——见过一次就不会认错。

level_121_before.speaker: Maya
level_121_before.text_en: Navigate to it. Remember: between its two southern stars hides the Ring Nebula you already observed. Constellations index the deep sky.
level_121_before.text_zh: 导航过去。记住：它南边两颗星之间，正藏着你观测过的环状星云。星座就是深空天体的索引。

level_123_before.speaker: Maya
level_123_before.text_en: Aquila the Eagle flies along the Milky Way toward Cygnus. Altair with its two guard stars makes the head.
level_123_before.text_zh: 天鹰座沿银河向天鹅座飞去。牛郎星和两颗护卫星组成鹰首。

level_123_before.speaker: Maya
level_123_before.text_en: Center the eagle. Altair is the Summer Triangle's third corner - after tonight you can draw the whole triangle from memory.
level_123_before.text_zh: 把天鹰居中。牛郎星是夏季大三角的第三个角——今晚之后，你就能凭记忆画出整个三角形了。

level_125_before.speaker: Maya
level_125_before.text_en: The V of Taurus is the Hyades cluster, and the bright orange eye is Aldebaran - not a member, just a foreground star.
level_125_before.text_zh: 金牛座的 V 字是毕星团，橙色亮眼是毕宿五——它其实不是星团成员，只是恰好在前景。

level_125_before.speaker: Maya
level_125_before.text_en: Navigate the V to center. On the bull's shoulder ride the Pleiades you observed at low power. The sky is connecting itself.
level_125_before.text_zh: 把 V 字导航到中心。牛肩上正驮着你用低倍率看过的昴星团。星空正在自己连成一张网。

level_127_before.speaker: Maya
level_127_before.text_en: Scorpius actually looks like its name - the curved tail, the claws, and red Antares as the heart.
level_127_before.text_zh: 天蝎座真的名副其实——弯曲的尾巴、张开的螯，红色的心宿二就是蝎心。

level_127_before.speaker: Maya
level_127_before.text_en: It hugs the southern horizon, so navigate carefully: low sky means thicker air and fewer visible stars to guide you.
level_127_before.text_zh: 它贴着南方地平线，导航要格外小心：低空意味着更厚的大气和更少的引导星。

level_129_before.speaker: Maya
level_129_before.text_en: Orion's belt is the most famous signpost in the sky. Tonight, center the Hunter and read his pointers.
level_129_before.text_zh: 猎户座腰带是星空中最著名的路标。今晚把猎人居中，读懂他的指向。

level_129_before.speaker: Maya
level_129_before.text_en: Belt down-left finds Sirius; up-right finds Aldebaran. And below the belt hangs the nebula where you started this journey.
level_129_before.text_zh: 腰带向左下指向天狼星，向右上指向毕宿五。腰带下方悬着的，正是你这段旅程开始的猎户星云。

level_131_before.speaker: Maya
level_131_before.text_en: Leo closes the constellation course. The backwards question mark is the lion's mane; Regulus sits at its foot.
level_131_before.text_zh: 狮子座为星座课程收官。反写的问号是狮子的鬃毛，轩辕十四在它脚下。

level_131_before.speaker: Maya
level_131_before.text_en: Navigate it to center one last time. When Leo rises in the east, spring is coming - the sky is also a calendar.
level_131_before.text_zh: 最后一次把它导航到中心。狮子座从东方升起时，春天就要来了——星空同时也是一本日历。

level_92_after.speaker: Maya
level_92_after.text_en: You caught a planet through the thickest air in the sky - low altitude viewing is a timing skill, and you timed it.
level_92_after.text_zh: 你隔着天空中最厚的大气抓住了一颗行星——低空观测是时机的艺术，而你抓准了时机。

level_92_after.speaker: Maya
level_92_after.text_en: Next we do it again with a tighter window. Rest your eyes, then check the mission board.
level_92_after.text_zh: 接下来我们在更严的窗口里再来一次。休息一下眼睛，然后去任务板看看。

level_93_after.speaker: Maya
level_93_after.text_en: Twice now Mercury has kept its appointment with you. Low-sky patience is officially in your toolkit.
level_93_after.text_zh: 水星已经两次赴你的约了。低空耐心正式成为你的看家本领。

level_93_after.speaker: Maya
level_93_after.text_en: Venus is next - a brighter target with the opposite problem: too much light.
level_93_after.text_zh: 下一站金星——更亮的目标，问题正好相反：光太多了。

level_94_after.speaker: Maya
level_94_after.text_en: You balanced the exposure and the crescent survived. Overexposure, not darkness, is Venus's trap.
level_94_after.text_zh: 你稳住了曝光，弯月轮廓保住了。金星的陷阱不是黑暗，而是过曝。

level_94_after.speaker: Maya
level_94_after.text_en: Next time we compare magnifications on the same phase. The board has the details.
level_94_after.text_zh: 下次我们在同一月相下比较不同倍率。细节看任务板。

level_95_after.speaker: Maya
level_95_after.text_en: Low power framed the phase, high power dissected the edge - and the exposure rule held at both. That is real method.
level_95_after.text_zh: 低倍率框住月相，高倍率解剖边缘——曝光法则在两端都成立。这才叫方法论。

level_95_after.speaker: Maya
level_95_after.text_en: The planet course now leaves the inner solar system. Saturn is waiting.
level_95_after.text_zh: 行星课程现在离开内太阳系。土星在等你。

level_96_after.speaker: Maya
level_96_after.text_en: The moment the rings snapped into view is one every observer remembers. You earned it with the right power and a steady mount.
level_96_after.text_zh: 环状清晰浮现的那一刻，每个观测者都会记一辈子。你靠正确的倍率和稳定的支架赢得了它。

level_96_after.speaker: Maya
level_96_after.text_en: Next Saturn night the mount tracks and YOU tune it. Check the board when ready.
level_96_after.text_zh: 下个土星夜由支架追踪、你来调速。准备好了看任务板。

level_97_after.speaker: Maya
level_97_after.text_en: Eight seconds of a centered Saturn - tracking rate, drift reading, and correction all working together.
level_97_after.text_zh: 土星居中整整八秒——追踪速率、漂移判断和修正配合无间。

level_97_after.speaker: Maya
level_97_after.text_en: Two ice giants remain, and they play by different rules. Uranus first.
level_97_after.text_zh: 还剩两颗冰巨星，它们的规则完全不同。先是天王星。

level_98_after.speaker: Maya
level_98_after.text_en: A pale teal disk, not a point - you resolved Uranus. Focus precision turned a 'star' into a world.
level_98_after.text_zh: 一个淡青色的小圆面，而不是光点——你分辨出了天王星。对焦精度把一颗“星”变成了一个世界。

level_98_after.speaker: Maya
level_98_after.text_en: Next round the tolerance tightens. The board will call you back.
level_98_after.text_zh: 下一轮容差更严。任务板会再叫你。

level_99_after.speaker: Maya
level_99_after.text_en: Even at higher power and tighter focus, you held the disk. Star or planet is no longer a guess for you - it is a measurement.
level_99_after.text_zh: 更高倍率、更严对焦，你依然稳住了盘面。恒星还是行星对你不再是猜测，而是测量。

level_99_after.speaker: Maya
level_99_after.text_en: One planet remains, the faintest of all. Prepare your eyes for Neptune.
level_99_after.text_zh: 只剩一颗行星了，也是最暗的一颗。为海王星准备好你的眼睛。

level_100_after.speaker: Maya
level_100_after.text_en: Neptune found - the outermost planet, held in view by dark adaptation and a steady tracking hand.
level_100_after.text_zh: 找到海王星了——最外侧的行星，靠暗适应和稳定追踪留在了你的视野里。

level_100_after.speaker: Maya
level_100_after.text_en: The final exam adds averted vision and a longer hold. Then the planet course is complete.
level_100_after.text_zh: 期末考试还要加上侧视法和更长保持。之后行星课程就圆满了。

level_101_after.speaker: Maya
level_101_after.text_en: All eight planets' observing techniques, mastered. The averted-vision Neptune was your hardest catch yet.
level_101_after.text_zh: 八大行星的观测技巧，全部掌握。用侧视法捕捉海王星是你至今最难的一次成功。

level_101_after.speaker: Maya
level_101_after.text_en: Now we turn to a closer world with new detail every night: the Moon itself.
level_101_after.text_zh: 现在我们转向一个每晚都有新细节的近邻世界：月球本身。

level_102_after.speaker: Maya
level_102_after.text_en: The maria are lava plains, and you mapped them at exactly the right power - wide and low.
level_102_after.text_zh: 月海是凝固的熔岩平原，你用恰到好处的低倍率宽视场描绘了它们。

level_102_after.speaker: Maya
level_102_after.text_en: Next we climb into the crater country. Copernicus has terraces waiting.
level_102_after.text_zh: 接下来我们爬进环形山地带。哥白尼的阶梯坑壁在等你。

level_103_after.speaker: Maya
level_103_after.text_en: Terraced walls and a central peak - impact physics written in stone, and you read it.
level_103_after.text_zh: 阶梯坑壁和中央峰——写在岩石上的撞击物理，你读懂了。

level_103_after.speaker: Maya
level_103_after.text_en: The next lesson follows the shadow line itself: the terminator.
level_103_after.text_zh: 下一课沿着阴影分界线走：终结线。

level_104_after.speaker: Maya
level_104_after.text_en: You held the terminator while the Moon tried to walk away. Tracking plus attention beats lunar motion.
level_104_after.text_zh: 月亮想溜走，你却按住了终结线。追踪加专注胜过月球的移动。

level_104_after.speaker: Maya
level_104_after.text_en: One more Moon night: the same target at two magnifications.
level_104_after.text_zh: 还有一个月面之夜：同一目标，两种倍率。

level_105_after.speaker: Maya
level_105_after.text_en: Whole-line context at low power, single-shadow drama at high power - you now choose magnification on purpose.
level_105_after.text_zh: 低倍率看全线格局，高倍率看单影细节——你现在是有意识地选择倍率了。

level_105_after.speaker: Maya
level_105_after.text_en: The Moon course is complete. Next: two stars in one eyepiece, with different colors.
level_105_after.text_zh: 月面课程结束。接下来：同一目镜里的两颗星，颜色还不一样。

level_106_after.speaker: Maya
level_106_after.text_en: Gold and sapphire in one field - star temperatures made visible. Albireo never disappoints.
level_106_after.text_zh: 一个视场里的金色与宝蓝——恒星温度变得肉眼可见。辇道增七从不让人失望。

level_106_after.speaker: Maya
level_106_after.text_en: Next time we hold the pair apart under stricter stability. Board when ready.
level_106_after.text_zh: 下次要在更严的稳定性下保持双星分离。准备好了看任务板。

level_107_after.speaker: Maya
level_107_after.text_en: Clean separation, start to finish. Stability discipline is what turns a pretty view into a real observation.
level_107_after.text_zh: 从头到尾干净分离。稳定性纪律让漂亮的景象变成真正的观测。

level_107_after.speaker: Maya
level_107_after.text_en: Now the targets grow: entire clusters of stars. Bring your widest view.
level_107_after.text_zh: 现在目标变大了：整团整团的恒星。带上你最宽的视野。

level_108_after.speaker: Maya
level_108_after.text_en: Seven sisters in one frame - you solved a problem by zooming OUT. Remember this night.
level_108_after.text_zh: 一个画面装下七姐妹——你用缩小倍率解决了问题。记住这个夜晚。

level_108_after.speaker: Maya
level_108_after.text_en: Next cluster is the opposite: a ball so dense you must zoom IN to resolve it.
level_108_after.text_zh: 下一个星团正相反：密得必须放大才能分解。

level_109_after.speaker: Maya
level_109_after.text_en: From smudge to swarm - dark adaptation plus magnification resolved M13's halo into stars.
level_109_after.text_zh: 从一团模糊到一群星点——暗适应加倍率把 M13 的光晕分解成了恒星。

level_109_after.speaker: Maya
level_109_after.text_en: Nebulae are next, and they demand even darker eyes and a filter.
level_109_after.text_zh: 接下来是星云，它们需要更深的暗适应，还有滤镜。

level_110_after.speaker: Maya
level_110_after.text_en: A smoke ring left by a dying star, and you saw it - filter on, eyes dark, patience long.
level_110_after.text_zh: 一颗垂死恒星留下的烟圈，而你看到了——滤镜开启、眼睛适暗、耐心十足。

level_110_after.speaker: Maya
level_110_after.text_en: Next Ring night is an experiment: your direct vision versus your averted vision.
level_110_after.text_zh: 下个环状星云之夜是一场实验：你的直视对阵你的侧视。

level_111_after.speaker: Maya
level_111_after.text_en: You proved it on your own retina: averted vision wins on faint light. That trick works on every dim target forever.
level_111_after.text_zh: 你在自己的视网膜上证明了：微光之下侧视更强。这一招对所有暗弱目标永远有效。

level_111_after.speaker: Maya
level_111_after.text_en: The Lagoon comes next - a nebula so wide the rule is 'never zoom in'.
level_111_after.text_zh: 接下来是礁湖星云——宽到规则变成了“千万别放大”。

level_112_after.speaker: Maya
level_112_after.text_en: You kept the whole lagoon in frame and its shape told the story. Field of view is an instrument too.
level_112_after.text_zh: 你把整个礁湖装进画面，形状自己讲完了故事。视场本身也是一件仪器。

level_112_after.speaker: Maya
level_112_after.text_en: One target remains in this course - a galaxy, the faintest light you have ever chased.
level_112_after.text_zh: 本课程只剩一个目标——一个星系，你追过的最微弱的光。

level_113_after.speaker: Maya
level_113_after.text_en: Thirty million year old light, caught by your mirror and your fully adapted eye. The Sombrero's dust lane appeared - the deep sky course is yours.
level_113_after.text_zh: 三千万年前的光，被你的镜面和完全适暗的眼睛接住了。草帽星系的尘埃带显现——深空课程完美收官。

level_113_after.speaker: Maya
level_113_after.text_en: From here, the sky opens in every direction. Check the board for the constellation course.
level_113_after.text_zh: 从这里开始，星空向每个方向敞开。去任务板看看星座课程吧。

level_114_after.speaker: Maya
level_114_after.text_en: Seven stars, one unmistakable shape - you now recognize the Dipper the way sailors have for three thousand years.
level_114_after.text_zh: 七颗星，一个不会认错的形状——你现在认北斗的方式，和三千年来的航海者一样。

level_114_after.speaker: Maya
level_114_after.text_en: Next we USE the pattern: navigate the sky by it. Same stars, new job.
level_114_after.text_zh: 接下来要“用”这个图形：靠它在天上导航。同样的星，新的任务。

level_115_after.speaker: Maya
level_115_after.text_en: Pattern centered, position logged - and you know the pointer trick to Polaris. That is navigation.
level_115_after.text_zh: 图形居中、位置入档——你还学会了指极星的诀窍。这就是导航。

level_115_after.speaker: Maya
level_115_after.text_en: Cassiopeia's W is next: the Dipper's partner on the other side of the pole.
level_115_after.text_zh: 接下来是仙后座的 W：北天极另一侧、北斗的搭档。

level_116_after.speaker: Maya
level_116_after.text_en: The W snapped into recognition - five stars, one letter, visible all year.
level_116_after.text_zh: W 一眼即认——五颗星、一个字母，全年可见。

level_116_after.speaker: Maya
level_116_after.text_en: Now navigate it to center and pair it with the Dipper in your mental map.
level_116_after.text_zh: 现在把它导航到中心，在心里的星图上和北斗配成一对。

level_117_after.speaker: Maya
level_117_after.text_en: Two circumpolar signposts mastered. North is now something you can always find, any season.
level_117_after.text_zh: 两个拱极路标都掌握了。从此任何季节，北方你都找得到。

level_117_after.speaker: Maya
level_117_after.text_en: The summer sky calls next: a swan flying down the Milky Way.
level_117_after.text_zh: 接下来夏夜星空在召唤：一只沿银河飞翔的天鹅。

level_118_after.speaker: Maya
level_118_after.text_en: The Northern Cross, recognized - Cygnus's neck runs straight down the Milky Way's stream.
level_118_after.text_zh: 北十字认出来了——天鹅座的颈项正顺着银河的流向。

level_118_after.speaker: Maya
level_118_after.text_en: Next flight you steer the swan to center and claim a Summer Triangle corner.
level_118_after.text_zh: 下次飞行由你把天鹅摆到中心，并拿下夏季大三角的一角。

level_119_after.speaker: Maya
level_119_after.text_en: Swan centered, Deneb claimed. One Summer Triangle corner down, two to go.
level_119_after.text_zh: 天鹅居中，天津四到手。夏季大三角已得一角，还剩两个。

level_119_after.speaker: Maya
level_119_after.text_en: Lyra is next door - small, precise, and hiding a nebula you know.
level_119_after.text_zh: 隔壁就是天琴座——小巧、精确，还藏着一个你认识的星云。

level_120_after.speaker: Maya
level_120_after.text_en: Vega and its parallelogram, recognized without hesitation. Small constellations reward precision.
level_120_after.text_zh: 织女星和它的平行四边形，毫不犹豫认出。小星座回报的是精确。

level_120_after.speaker: Maya
level_120_after.text_en: Navigate it next - and remember what hides between its southern stars.
level_120_after.text_zh: 接下来导航过去——记得它南侧两星之间藏着什么。

level_121_after.speaker: Maya
level_121_after.text_en: Lyra centered - and you connected a constellation to a deep-sky object you have personally observed. The sky is becoming YOUR map.
level_121_after.text_zh: 天琴居中——你还把一个星座和自己亲手观测过的深空天体连了起来。星空正在变成你自己的地图。

level_121_after.speaker: Maya
level_121_after.text_en: The Eagle flies next. Altair completes the Summer Triangle.
level_121_after.text_zh: 接下来轮到天鹰。牛郎星将补全夏季大三角。

level_122_after.speaker: Maya
level_122_after.text_en: Altair and its guards, recognized. The Eagle rides the same Milky Way current as the Swan.
level_122_after.text_zh: 牛郎星和护卫星,认出来了。天鹰和天鹅乘着同一条银河之流。

level_122_after.speaker: Maya
level_122_after.text_en: Center it next flight and the Summer Triangle is complete.
level_122_after.text_zh: 下次把它居中，夏季大三角就完整了。

level_123_after.speaker: Maya
level_123_after.text_en: Summer Triangle complete: Vega, Deneb, Altair - all found, all centered, all yours.
level_123_after.text_zh: 夏季大三角集齐：织女、天津四、牛郎——全部找到、全部居中、全部属于你。

level_123_after.speaker: Maya
level_123_after.text_en: The zodiac is next. A bull with an orange eye is waiting in the winter sky.
level_123_after.text_zh: 接下来进入黄道。一头橙色眼睛的公牛在冬夜等你。

level_124_after.speaker: Maya
level_124_after.text_en: The V of the Hyades plus Aldebaran's orange glare - Taurus, recognized.
level_124_after.text_zh: 毕星团的 V 字加上毕宿五的橙色光芒——金牛座,认出来了。

level_124_after.speaker: Maya
level_124_after.text_en: Steer the bull to center next, and greet the Pleiades on its shoulder.
level_124_after.text_zh: 接下来把公牛摆到中心,顺便问候它肩上的昴星团。

level_125_after.speaker: Maya
level_125_after.text_en: Bull centered, and the foreground-star secret of Aldebaran understood. Depth returns to the flat sky.
level_125_after.text_zh: 公牛居中，还看破了毕宿五只是前景星的秘密。扁平的天空重新有了纵深。

level_125_after.speaker: Maya
level_125_after.text_en: Next: a scorpion hugging the southern horizon, with a red heart.
level_125_after.text_zh: 接下来：一只贴着南方地平线的蝎子，有一颗红色的心。

level_126_after.speaker: Maya
level_126_after.text_en: Curved tail, spread claws, red Antares - Scorpius looks like its myth, and you recognized it.
level_126_after.text_zh: 弯尾、张螯、红色心宿二——天蝎座名副其实，而你认出了它。

level_126_after.speaker: Maya
level_126_after.text_en: Navigating it will be low-sky work. Take the patience you learned from Mercury.
level_126_after.text_zh: 导航它是低空作业。带上你从水星那里学来的耐心。

level_127_after.speaker: Maya
level_127_after.text_en: A low target navigated through thick air - Mercury's patience lesson, reused on a constellation. Skills stack.
level_127_after.text_zh: 隔着厚厚的大气导航低空目标——水星教的耐心，用到了星座上。技能是会叠加的。

level_127_after.speaker: Maya
level_127_after.text_en: Winter's greatest signpost is next: the Hunter himself.
level_127_after.text_zh: 接下来是冬夜最伟大的路标：猎人本人。

level_128_after.speaker: Maya
level_128_after.text_en: Belt, shoulders, feet - Orion recognized. The most useful pattern in the whole winter sky.
level_128_after.text_zh: 腰带、双肩、双脚——猎户座认出来了。整个冬夜天空最有用的图形。

level_128_after.speaker: Maya
level_128_after.text_en: Center him next and learn what his belt points at.
level_128_after.text_zh: 接下来把他居中，学学他的腰带都指向哪里。

level_129_after.speaker: Maya
level_129_after.text_en: Orion centered, pointers read: Sirius one way, Aldebaran the other, a nebula below the belt. One constellation, four destinations.
level_129_after.text_zh: 猎户居中，指向读毕：一头是天狼星，一头是毕宿五，腰带下还挂着星云。一个星座,四个目的地。

level_129_after.speaker: Maya
level_129_after.text_en: One constellation remains. The Lion carries spring on its back.
level_129_after.text_zh: 只剩最后一个星座了。狮子背上驮着春天。

level_130_after.speaker: Maya
level_130_after.text_en: The backwards question mark and Regulus - Leo, recognized. Your ninth and final pattern.
level_130_after.text_zh: 反写的问号和轩辕十四——狮子座,认出来了。你的第九个、也是最后一个图形。

level_130_after.speaker: Maya
level_130_after.text_en: One last navigation and the constellation course - and this whole sky year - is complete.
level_130_after.text_zh: 最后一次导航,星座课程——以及这整年的星空——就圆满了。

level_131_after.speaker: Maya
level_131_after.text_en: Nine constellations recognized, connected, and navigated. You can now walk into any clear night, anywhere, and never be lost.
level_131_after.text_zh: 九个星座,全部识别、连线、导航完成。从今往后,任何地方的晴夜,你都不会再迷路。

level_131_after.speaker: Maya
level_131_after.text_en: That was the last lesson of the expansion course. The observatory - and the sky - are yours.
level_131_after.text_zh: 这是扩展课程的最后一课。观测站——和整片星空——都是你的了。

92.en: Mercury hides in twilight below 24°. Catch it early, keep power modest, wait out the shimmer.
92.zh: 水星藏在 24° 以下的暮光里。早点抓住它，倍率适中，等大气平静的瞬间。

93.en: Mercury again, higher window (12-28°), max 80x. Decide faster - twilight will not wait.
93.zh: 再战水星，窗口更高（12-28°），最高 80 倍。决断要更快——暮光不等人。

94.en: Venus is TOO bright. Keep exposure inside the window or the crescent burns away.
94.zh: 金星太亮了。把曝光保持在窗口内，否则弯月边缘会被烧掉。

95.en: Same Venus phase at two powers. Manage exposure at BOTH before you compare.
95.zh: 同一金星月相,两种倍率。比较前先在两个倍率下都调好曝光。

96.en: Saturn's rings need 65-130x and a stable mount. Wait for steady air to see the gap.
96.zh: 土星环需要 65-130 倍和稳定支架。等大气稳定才能看清环缝。

97.en: Saturn with tracking: rate near 1.0, hold centered 8s. Drift direction reveals rate error.
97.zh: 追踪看土星：速率接近 1.0，居中保持 8 秒。漂移方向会暴露速率误差。

98.en: Uranus is a tiny teal disk. 85x minimum and precise focus - or it stays a 'star'.
98.zh: 天王星是极小的青色圆面。至少 85 倍加精确对焦——否则它永远只是颗“星”。

99.en: Uranus, tighter focus tolerance, 90x+. Disk versus point is a measurement now.
99.zh: 天王星，更严对焦容差，90 倍以上。圆面还是光点，现在要用测量说话。

100.en: Neptune needs dark adaptation 65%+, tracking, and a 10s hold. The faintest planet.
100.zh: 海王星需要 65% 以上暗适应、追踪和 10 秒保持。最暗的行星。

101.en: Neptune final: 80% adaptation, averted vision ON, 12s hold. Trust your peripheral eye.
101.zh: 海王星期末考：80% 暗适应、开启侧视、保持 12 秒。相信你的余光。

102.en: Lunar maria want LOW power (≤60x). Map the dark plains as one connected picture.
102.zh: 月海要用低倍率（≤60 倍）。把暗色平原当作一整幅图来描绘。

103.en: Copernicus: 70x+, careful focus. Find the terraced walls and central peak.
103.zh: 哥白尼环形山：70 倍以上，细心对焦。找到阶梯坑壁和中央峰。

104.en: The terminator moves - keep tracking on and hold the shadow line 7s.
104.zh: 终结线在移动——保持追踪，让阴影线停留 7 秒。

105.en: One Moon, two powers. Compare what each magnification reveals and conceals.
105.zh: 同一月面，两种倍率。比较每种倍率显示了什么、又隐藏了什么。

106.en: Albireo: gold + sapphire double star. 70x+ splits the pair; colors = temperatures.
106.zh: 辇道增七：金蓝双星。70 倍以上分开两星；颜色就是温度。

107.en: Albireo held apart: power window 65-120x, stability 68+. Discipline night.
107.zh: 稳定分离辇道增七：倍率窗口 65-120 倍，稳定性 68 以上。纪律之夜。

108.en: Pleiades do NOT fit at high power. Use your lowest magnification - all seven sisters at once.
108.zh: 昴星团高倍率装不下。用最低倍率——七姐妹一次看全。

109.en: M13: find the halo at low power, adapt your eyes, then resolve stars at higher power.
109.zh: M13：低倍率找到光晕，适应黑暗，再用较高倍率分解恒星。

110.en: Ring Nebula: filter ON, adaptation 80%, averted vision. A dying star's smoke ring.
110.zh: 环状星云：开滤镜、80% 暗适应、侧视法。垂死恒星的烟圈。

111.en: Ring Nebula experiment: direct vs averted vision. Note which shows more.
111.zh: 环状星云实验：直视对比侧视。记下哪种看得更多。

112.en: Lagoon Nebula: stay WIDE (≤60x), filter on, protect adaptation. Shape is the target.
112.zh: 礁湖星云：保持宽视场（≤60 倍）、开滤镜、护住暗适应。形状就是目标。

113.en: Sombrero galaxy: no filter helps. Full adaptation + averted vision + tracking + 12s hold.
113.zh: 草帽星系：滤镜无用。满暗适应＋侧视＋追踪＋12 秒保持,全都要。

114.en: Big Dipper: pick the right pattern, then connect its 7 stars in order.
114.zh: 北斗七星：先选对图形,再按顺序连起 7 颗星。

115.en: Big Dipper navigation: center the pattern at its catalog Az/Alt. Bowl stars point to Polaris.
115.zh: 北斗导航：把图形居中到星表方位/高度。斗口两星指向北极星。

116.en: Cassiopeia: five stars, one W. Circumpolar - visible every night of the year.
116.zh: 仙后座：五颗星,一个 W。拱极星座——全年每晚可见。

117.en: Navigate the W to center. Dipper low = W high: together they always give north.
117.zh: 把 W 导航到中心。北斗低垂时 W 高挂：合起来永远指北。

118.en: Cygnus: the Northern Cross flying along the Milky Way. Recognize the long neck.
118.zh: 天鹅座：沿银河飞翔的北十字。认出那条长颈。

119.en: Center the Swan. Deneb = one corner of the Summer Triangle.
119.zh: 把天鹅居中。天津四＝夏季大三角的一角。

120.en: Lyra: brilliant Vega + a small parallelogram. Small but unmistakable.
120.zh: 天琴座：明亮织女星＋小平行四边形。虽小但绝不会认错。

121.en: Navigate Lyra to center. The Ring Nebula hides between its southern stars.
121.zh: 把天琴座导航到中心。环状星云就藏在它南侧两星之间。

122.en: Aquila: Altair with two guard stars, flying the Milky Way toward Cygnus.
122.zh: 天鹰座：牛郎星带两颗护卫星,沿银河飞向天鹅座。

123.en: Center the Eagle - Altair completes your Summer Triangle.
123.zh: 把天鹰居中——牛郎星补全你的夏季大三角。

124.en: Taurus: the Hyades V plus orange Aldebaran. The Pleiades ride its shoulder.
124.zh: 金牛座：毕星团 V 字加橙色毕宿五。昴星团就在牛肩上。

125.en: Navigate the V to center. Aldebaran is a foreground star, not a cluster member.
125.zh: 把 V 字导航到中心。毕宿五是前景星,不是星团成员。

126.en: Scorpius: curved tail, spread claws, red Antares heart. Hugs the southern horizon.
126.zh: 天蝎座：弯尾、张螯、红色心宿二。贴着南方地平线。

127.en: Navigate Scorpius low in the south. Thick air, fewer guide stars - patience.
127.zh: 在南天低空导航天蝎座。大气厚、引导星少——要有耐心。

128.en: Orion: belt, shoulders, feet. The winter sky's master signpost.
128.zh: 猎户座：腰带、双肩、双脚。冬夜天空的总路标。

129.en: Center Orion. Belt points: down-left Sirius, up-right Aldebaran.
129.zh: 把猎户居中。腰带指向：左下天狼星,右上毕宿五。

130.en: Leo: the backwards question mark mane, Regulus at the foot. Final pattern.
130.zh: 狮子座：反问号鬃毛,脚下轩辕十四。最后一个图形。

131.en: Navigate Leo to center - the constellation course finale. Leo rising = spring coming.
131.zh: 把狮子座导航到中心——星座课程收官。狮子东升,春天将至。
